'''Toma Hi'Ilani''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a foremost tech expert 
during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Toma Hi'Ilani was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Training independently as a [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel]], Master Hi'Ilani became one of the Order's foremost [[Technician/Legends|technical]] authorities on galactic state-of-the-art technologies.

Stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], it was common for [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] serving in the field to keep their [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]] updated with Master Hi'Ilani's latest techniques.

In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] utilized Hi'Ilani's methods during his [[mission to Romin]] with his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and other Jedi in their pursuit of galactic criminal [[Jenna Zan Arbor]].<ref name="COTG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' {{1stm}}
